shakshi: Asmodeus's domain — the final ring before the Royal, the last gate of the alchemical chain
The player entered the temptation space — Succubi and Incubi present, three paths available
The player held through the temptation — clean passage
The player gave in — life slowly drained, retire condition approaching. The desire that should have rescued became the thing that consumed.
The player seduced the Lounge with their accumulated story — everything from 0001 to 0035 as the material
Asmodeus approved — the story was worth telling. He reads desire and what it cost, not virtue.
Asmodeus's blessing — the gate to the Royal Ring opened
Personally bestowed by Asmodeus — distinct from the imp's crystal and the dream dust, the third and final crystal in the chain
The Lust Ring token granted — all eight rings behind the player
The innermost space of Sulphera — the destination glimpsed from Lucifer's castle in 0021 arrived
Drovitth met at the Orrery — watching the causal chain, close friends with Hypatia, here because Saelith's birth is structurally necessary
The alchemical chain from 0007 complete — the player's longing dissolved into dust, coagulated into medicine, became the instrument of the rescue
The horizon established in 0021 arrived — the Orrery seen from the inside for the first time
The player sees what Hypatia became to survive the Royal Ring — demonified, deliberate, present
The player may or may not learn about Saelith here depending on what Hypatia chooses to tell — the birth is coming regardless
